method: First-viewport screenshots from visible UI; real keyboard and touch input; three Puzzle locks by normal gravity; detached canonical/text/renderer snapshot comparison only. Deterministic time advances ticks without replacing state, and no terminal state is fabricated.

buttons.text: 马拉松持续消行，刷新分数与等级。开始→
竞速速度持续提升｜无终点｜主动退出或堆叠到顶结束开始→
解谜六关全开，连续七袋方块，目标是清空棋盘。选关→
